display.purpose: Page titles and primary section headers. One per view maximum.

headline.purpose: Card headers, modal titles, named entities.

title.purpose: Sub-section headers, table column headers, named groups.

body.purpose: All prose and data. Max 65–75ch line length.

label.purpose: Section identifiers inside cards. Always uppercase. System signature.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Full modals and dialogs only. Never on cards or inline panels.

shadows.name: card-inset
shadows.purpose: Top edge of card header sections. Near-invisible material lip.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Ease-out-quart feel.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Interactive state changes: hover, active, focus.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Highest-authority action in any view. One per primary action group.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg> Add Lead</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: oklch(0.62 0.22 240); color: oklch(0.98 0 0); padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.68 0.22 240); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.62 0.22 240 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.57 0.22 240); transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Equal-weight alternative path. Cancellation, secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: oklch(0.238 0.007 240); color: oklch(0.935 0.006 240); padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.272 0.006 240); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.62 0.22 240 / 0.5); }

components.name: Tertiary Button
components.description: Inline and low-priority actions. Edit, view, icon-only operations.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-tertiary"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"/><path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"/></svg> Edit</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-tertiary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.55 0.012 240); padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 0.2s; outline: none; } .ds-btn-tertiary:hover { background: oklch(0.238 0.007 240); color: oklch(0.935 0.006 240); } .ds-btn-tertiary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.62 0.22 240 / 0.5); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: State and category indicators. Never used as navigation or actions.
components.html: NewContactedConvertedArchived
components.css: .ds-chips-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-chip-new { background: oklch(0.238 0.007 240); color: oklch(0.935 0.006 240); } .ds-chip-contacted { background: oklch(0.70 0.15 80 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.75 0.15 80); } .ds-chip-converted { background: oklch(0.65 0.15 145 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.65 0.15 145); } .ds-chip-archived { background: oklch(0.60 0.18 25 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.65 0.18 25); }

components.name: Card with Section Header
components.description: Standard panel container. Section header uses the Label type signature.
components.html:
Contact Info

petros@example.com

Work email
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.200 0.007 240); border: 1px solid oklch(0.280 0.010 240 / 0.8); border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; background: oklch(0.238 0.007 240 / 0.4); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.280 0.010 240 / 0.6); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / 0.04) inset; } .ds-card-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(0.62 0.22 240 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.62 0.22 240); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-label { font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.55 0.012 240); margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-card-data { font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.935 0.006 240); margin: 0 0 2px; } .ds-card-meta { font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: oklch(0.55 0.012 240); margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Signal Blue on focus, danger on error.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.935 0.006 240); } .ds-input { background: oklch(0.208 0.007 240); border: 1px solid oklch(0.310 0.012 240); border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.935 0.006 240); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.46 0.012 240); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.62 0.22 240); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.62 0.22 240 / 0.25); } .ds-input:hover:not(:focus) { border-color: oklch(0.380 0.012 240); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation. Active state uses Signal Blue tint and inset ring.
components.html: ContactsLeadsCampaigns
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 8px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.55 0.012 240); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; outline: none; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.238 0.007 240); color: oklch(0.935 0.006 240); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.62 0.22 240) 12%, transparent); color: oklch(0.935 0.006 240); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.62 0.22 240) 22%, transparent); } .ds-nav-item--active svg { color: oklch(0.62 0.22 240); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.62 0.22 240 / 0.5); }

narrative.overview:
Leadfinder is built for people who run operations. The interface functions like a command center: information appears precisely where it's needed, controls are unambiguous, and every surface serves the mission. There is no decoration that doesn't earn its place. A sales team running outreach shouldn't notice the UI — they should notice the lead.

The dark theme is not aesthetic preference, it's operational posture. Ambient low-light environments, long sessions, high information density — the dark surface reduces fatigue and keeps focus on the data. Signal Blue appears like an indicator light: rare, precise, and always meaningful. When it's on, something needs attention or is active. Overuse destroys its authority.

This system explicitly rejects the neon/hacker aesthetic (glow-for-glow's-sake, cyberpunk overload, garish accents) and the Bloomberg terminal data-overload pattern (intimidating walls of information with no breathing room). Dense is fine. Overwhelming is a failure.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first, flat surface hierarchy — no drop shadows at rest
Signal Blue used with restraint; its rarity is the point
Confident, direct components: solid fills, unambiguous interactive states
Tonal depth through background steps, not elevation shadows
System-UI typography: functional, fast, no font personality competing with the data
Hue consistency: every neutral carries hue 240°, binding the palette into a single tonal system

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue covers ≤10% of any given screen. It is a status light, not wallpaper. If it appears on more than one element without a deliberate reason, audit and remove until it means something again.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: All neutrals carry chroma 0.006–0.012 at hue 240°. Zero-chroma neutrals are prohibited. They sever the tonal relationship that makes the palette feel like a system.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Size Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is established through weight contrast (400 → 600) before size increases. Increase size only when weight alone is insufficient.

rules.name: The Flat-First Rule
rules.body: If a shadow isn't on a modal, a dropdown, or an active-state ring, remove it. Floating cards, ambient glow effects, and decorative box-shadows are prohibited.

rules.name: The No-Nested-Cards Rule
rules.body: A card inside a card is prohibited. Use tonal surface steps to create sub-sections. Nesting rounded-2xl containers creates redundant chrome.

dos: Do tint every neutral toward hue 240° (chroma 0.006–0.012). Zero-chroma grays break the tonal system.
Do use Signal Blue only for active states, primary CTAs, focus rings, and key data signals.
Do establish hierarchy through weight contrast first (400 → 600), size second.
Do keep card section headers at text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-muted.
Do use rounded-2xl for major containers and rounded-xl for nested components.
Do use duration-200 for all interactive state transitions.
Do let tonal surface steps carry spatial depth before reaching for shadows.
Do keep maximum body line length at 65–75ch.
donts: Don't add glow effects, neon accents, colored drop shadows, or any box-shadow that uses Signal Blue as its shadow color.
Don't create views that overwhelm with data. Every screen has one primary action.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, list items, or callouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't add drop shadows to cards or section panels.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, padding, margin). Animate transform and opacity only.
Don't bounce or use elastic easing. Ease-out curves only.
Don't use em dashes in any UI copy.
